nasb.text: Then King Darius issued a decree, and search was made in the archives, where the treasures were stored in Babylon.

esv.text: Then Darius the king made a decree, and search was made in Babylonia, in the house of the archives where the documents were stored.

cnv.text: 於是，大利烏王下令考查在巴比倫庫房的檔案，

ccb.text: 于是，大流士王下令查阅保存在巴比伦库房里的典籍。
